verse_text: But His disciples said to Him, 'You see the multitude thronging You, and You say, 'Who touched Me?' '

pericope.title: The Woman with a Flow of Blood

links.context: In light of this passage, consider the account of the woman with the issue of blood, who, though unclean--but because of her faith in Christ--dared to touch the Lord as He allowed it ([[MRK.5:25]]-34).
